name: The Smart-Grid Traffic Light
description: Access the city's municipal routing token by triggering a maintenance override.

flaws.name: Force All Red Lights
flaws.flavor_text: Manipulate grid intersections to lock all traffic lights on red, invoking the emergency ambulance-override protocol.

flaws.name: Trigger Shorted Button
flaws.flavor_text: Ping the short-circuited pedestrian crosswalk button. The signal collides with the ambulance-override, tricking the controller into diagnostic mode and releasing the routing token.
